name: 10 Pizza

notes: The browser-rendered Toast source contains 56 cards representing 52 unique current menu items after four merchandising duplicates are removed.
The frozen baseline has 46 direct name matches, four renamed matches, seven artifacts, and omits VODKA and the CLASSIC calzone.
The corrected snapshot preserves each card’s actual section, name, description, and item URL.
Neither the restaurant website nor its linked Toast menu publishes an allergen guide, allergen matrix, or ingredient statements.
Menu descriptions mentioning cheese, milk, or other foods are not ingredient disclosures and cannot support official allergen labels.
All 52 corrected items therefore use allergenSourceType unavailable with no asserted allergens.
Verified the rendered Toast card DOM directly rather than relying on cross-paired generic card output.
Verified that description text was incorrectly promoted to official-ingredients in the baseline; the correction removes those claims.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Restaurant site fetched successfully; it links to Toast and contains no allergen or ingredient disclosure.
Browser-rendered linked Toast menu preserved; 56 cards, 52 unique current items, no allergen disclosure.
Targeted searches of the restaurant and Toast domains found menu pages but no official allergen source.

findings.summary: Twenty-seven baseline rows promoted menu-description words to official ingredient allergen claims without an ingredient or allergen source.
findings.resolution: The corrected 52-item snapshot marks allergen information unavailable for every item.

findings.summary: Baseline descriptions, categories, and variant groups were cross-paired between unrelated Toast cards.
findings.resolution: The audit snapshot reads each name, description, URL, and section from the same rendered menu card.

findings.summary: The baseline contains seven non-item artifacts, truncates four current names, and omits two current menu items.
findings.resolution: The correction contains the 52 unique current Toast items, including VODKA and CLASSIC, with artifacts removed.

repairs.summary: Prepared a corrected 52-item menu snapshot from the restaurant-linked Toast cards; all allergen fields are accurately unavailable.

notes: The audit fixes the data specification. It does not treat inferred ingredients or pipeline behavior as the audit subject.
Rechecked all 57 frozen rows against the 52-item corrected Toast snapshot.
